title: Benchmark fixture generation
description: Given a fixture profile (social_media, ecommerce, complex_hierarchy) and scale factor, when I generate fixtures, it should produce the correct number of records with valid associations and realistic data distribution. Spec: features/benchmarks/fixture_generation.feature
